title: Spicy Korean Pepper Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy wrap filled with crispy puffed rice, crunchy Korean peppers, and a hint of savory flavor.

ingredients.name: Korean Peppers
ingredients.notes: also known as gochugaru, adjust to taste

instructions: Cook the puffed rice according to package instructions.
Cut the Korean peppers into thin slices.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, gochujang, and sesame oil.
In a separate bowl, mix together the cooked puffed rice and the sliced Korean peppers.
Add the sauce mixture to the rice mixture and stir until combined.
Warm the tortilla wrap in a dry pan or in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Spoon the rice mixture onto the wrap, leaving a small border around the edges.
Top with green onion and salt to taste.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
